events.title: Ceremonial check commemoration with Congresswoman LaMonica McIver
events.description:
On May 5th at 1230 hours, Congresswoman LaMonica McGovern will visit our department to present a ceremonial check commemorating a major investment toward the purchase of our new ladder truck. This is a historic moment for our department.

— Edited by DC F. Sousa on May 5, 2026

events.title: Lag BaOmer Event - 910 Salem Ave
events.description:
Rabbi Kenalsky Jr reached out to me to see if we could have a fire truck stop by the Lag BaOmer event they are hosting in their community.  Their are going to be 80 to 100 kids present of various ages.  We attended last year and handed out fire hats.  

I will let Paul know to have some fire hats ready for the truck to give out.

It will be at 530pm at 910 Salem Ave

Thanks, 
Ivan Abreu
